svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="321备份总览" id="backup-overview"> <mxGraphModel dx="-574" dy="-156" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="600" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="3-2-1 原则：3 份副本 · 2 种介质 · 1 份异地" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="540" x="280" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="prod" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="生产可用区 A

MySQL 主库
七牛 OSS 主 bucket
.env.prod 秘钥" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="220" x="80" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dr" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="灾备可用区 B（异地/异云）

MySQL 只读从库 (binlog 复制)
七牛 OSS 备用 bucket (跨区域镜像)
跨云 OSS 冷备 (阿里云/腾讯云)
age 加密秘钥副本" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="260" x="760" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="prod" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;exitX=1;exitY=0.3;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.3;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="dr" value="① binlog 持续复制 (RPO ≤ 5min)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="prod" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;exitX=1;exitY=0.55;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.6;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="dr" value="② 每日全量 mysqldump → gzip+SHA256 → 跨云"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="prod" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;exitX=1;exitY=0.8;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.85;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="dr" value="③ OSS 跨云增量同步 (rclone --checksum)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="layers" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f1f5f9;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;verticalAlign=middle;" value="备份三层体系

第一层 binlog 热复制（RPO 主力）
第二层 每日全量 dump（干净快照兜底）
第三层 manifest 日报（可观测性，防静默失败）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="380" x="360" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ret" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="保留策略：日备×7 / 周备×4 / 月备×12，每份 3 副本（本地磁盘 + 跨云 OSS 两区域）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="580" x="260" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="drill" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;align=center;" value="每月恢复演练（5 步 SOP）→ 失败即阻断发布" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="440" x="330" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ed1" edge="1" parent="1" source="ret" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" target="drill"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 7px; margin-left: 470px;

div.div: 3-2-1 原则：3 份副本 · 2 种介质 · 1 份异地

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 368px; height: 1px; padding-top: 290px; margin-left: 292px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
备份三层体系
第一层 binlog 热复制（RPO 主力）
第二层 每日全量 dump（干净快照兜底）
第三层 manifest 日报（可观测性，防静默失败）

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 578px; height: 1px; padding-top: 400px; margin-left: 181px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 保留策略：日备×7 / 周备×4 / 月备×12，每份 3 副本（本地磁盘 + 跨云 OSS 两区域）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 438px; height: 1px; padding-top: 472px; margin-left: 251px;

div.div: 每月恢复演练（5 步 SOP）→ 失败即阻断发布
